map.message: $(string.map_ScanBitmapReasonReload requested because of an exception or configuration change)
$(string.map_ScanBitmapReasonCould not extend Mft without fragmenting it)
$(string.map_ScanBitmapReasonPreviously reduced Mft zone is now being expanded)
$(string.map_ScanBitmapReasonProactive background scan to repopulate cached runs)

string.id: map_ScanBitmapReasonReload requested because of an exception or configuration change
string.value: Reload requested because of an exception or configuration change

string.id: map_ScanBitmapReasonCould not extend Mft without fragmenting it
string.value: Could not extend Mft without fragmenting it

string.id: map_ScanBitmapReasonPreviously reduced Mft zone is now being expanded
string.value: Previously reduced Mft zone is now being expanded

string.id: map_ScanBitmapReasonProactive background scan to repopulate cached runs
string.value: Proactive background scan to repopulate cached runs
